case_title: PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. vs. AMANZE, PATRICK et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT AMANZE, MARJEANNE HEARING SET FOR OCT-28-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, CALENDAR OF OCT-28-1997, DENIED 5 DAYS TO FILE AN ANSWER. THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANTS MOTION WAS TOTALLY WITHOUT MERIT. THERE WAS ACTUAL SERVICE ADMITTED IN OPEN COURT.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT AMANZE, MARJEANNE
RM 504 JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY/CSR, ALEONG/CLERK - C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT; DEFT. PATRICK AMANZE NOT PRESENT; PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENTED BY PLTF; COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMANZE, PATRICK AMANZE, MARJEANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 100 FONT BLVD, #3-D, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $4,665.59 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,665.59, LEASE FORFEITED, RENT & DAMAGES AS TO PATRICK AMANZE ONLY.
MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT AMANZE, MARJEANNE HEARING SET FOR OCT-16-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
